617-227-4321
Boston Harbor Islands National and State Park is for everyone! The Boston Harbor Islands Partnership is committed to providing free and reduced-fare opportunities for groups and individuals.
Library pass provides 50% off all Boston Harbor Islands Ferry tickets from Long Wharf. Based on availability; reservations are recommended. Use the promo code from your confirmation email on the Boston Harbor City Cruises website for the library discount.
Public ferries from Long Wharf to the Boston Harbor Islands operate from May – October.
2025 Season Schedule
